stemHtml: An aircraft in distress normally remains in contact with ATC on the current frequency in use. What measures can ATC employ to offer improved assistance to the aircraft in distress?

options.a: Direct all other aircraft to change their course immediately without providing a reason.
options.b: Request the crew to change frequency.
options.c: All other aircraft will be directed to a new frequency.
options.d: Instruct the distressed aircraft to ascend to a higher altitude for better signal reception.
